MARISAMOD-SPARK_STRIKE.title: Spark Strike
MARISAMOD-DEFEND_MARISA.title: Defense
MARISAMOD-MASTER_SPARK.title: Master Spark
MARISAMOD-MASTER_SPARK.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Amplify {Energy:energyIcons()}: Deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage.
MARISAMOD-UP_SWEEP.title: Up Sweep
MARISAMOD-FINAL_MASTER_SPARK.title: Final Master Spark
MARISAMOD-FINAL_MASTER_SPARK.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
Amplify {Energy:energyIcons()}: Deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage.
MARISAMOD-MAGIC_AND_RED_DREAM.title: Magic and Red Dream
MARISAMOD-MAGIC_AND_RED_DREAM.descriptio: Draw {Power:diff()} cards then put a card from your [gold]Hand[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] when you activate an [gold]Amplify[/gold] or [gold]Charge-Up[/gold] effect.
MARISAMOD-ABSOLUTE_MAGNITUDE.title: Absolute Magnitude
MARISAMOD-ABSOLUTE_MAGNITUDE.description:
Deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} damage for each [gold]Charge-Up[/gold] you have.{InCombat:
(Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage)|}
MARISAMOD-ACCELERATION.title: Acceleration
MARISAMOD-ACCELERATION.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Add a [gold]Burn[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MARISAMOD-ALICES_GIFT.title: Alice's Gift
MARISAMOD-ALICES_GIFT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Amplify {Energy:energyIcons()}: Hit three times.
MARISAMOD-ASTEROID_BELT.title: Asteroid Belt
MARISAMOD-ASTEROID_BELT.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Amplify {Energy:energyIcons()}: At the start of your next turn, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
MARISAMOD-BIG_CRUNCH.title: Big Crunch
MARISAMOD-BIG_CRUNCH.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] half of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and [gold]Discard Pile[/gold]. For every {Div:diff()} cards exhausted, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw a card.{InCombat:
(Number of {Energy:energyIcons()} gain and draw: {CalculatedDraw:diff()} )|}
MARISAMOD-BINARY_STARS.title: Binary Stars
MARISAMOD-BINARY_STARS.description:
Choose a card from [gold]Black Flare Star[/gold] and [gold]White Dwarf[/gold] to add to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Amplify {Energy:energyIcons()}: Add both cards to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MARISAMOD-BLACK_FLARE_STAR.title: Black Flare Star
MARISAMOD-BLACK_FLARE_STAR.description: Can only be played if there are 4 or more cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold].Discard any number of cards, gaining {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each.
MARISAMOD-BOUND_OF_PROTAGONISTS.title: Bound of Protagonists
MARISAMOD-BOUND_OF_PROTAGONISTS.descript: Next {Power:diff()} times you would lose Hp, lose half that amount instead.
MARISAMOD-BUTT_SMASH.title: Butt Smash
MARISAMOD-BUTT_SMASH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to unblocked damage dealt.
MARISAMOD-WHITE_DWARF.title: White Dwarf
MARISAMOD-WHITE_DWARF.description:
Can only be played if there are 4 or fewer cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold].Deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} times the damage of your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] and add 2 [gold]Burn[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].{InCombat:
(Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage)|}
MARISAMOD-BLAZE_AWAY.title: Blaze Away
MARISAMOD-BLAZE_AWAY.description: Choose an Attack card. Add a copy of that card into your [gold]Hand[/gold].Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} equals to the cost of that card {IfUpgraded:show:plus its [gold]Amplify[/gold] cost|}.
MARISAMOD-BLAZING_STAR.title: Blazing Star
MARISAMOD-BLAZING_STAR.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. For each [gold]Burn[/gold] in your hand, deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage.
Amplify {Energy:energyIcons()}: Hit twice.
MARISAMOD-CASKET_OF_STAR.title: Casket of Star
MARISAMOD-CASKET_OF_STAR.description: Whenever you gain [gold]Block[/gold], add a {IfUpgraded:show:upgraded |}[gold]Spark[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MARISAMOD-CHARGE_UP_SPRAY.title: Charge-Up Spray
MARISAMOD-CHARGE_UP_SPRAY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If this card consumes Charge-up, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw 2 cards.
MARISAMOD-COLLECTING_QUIRK.title: Collecting Quirk
MARISAMOD-COLLECTING_QUIRK.description:
For every {Div:diff()} relics you have, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy.{InCombat:
(Hits {CalculatedHits:diff()} {CalculatedHits:plural:time|times})|}
MARISAMOD-CHARGING_UP.title: Charging Up
MARISAMOD-DARK_MATTER.title: Dark Matter
MARISAMOD-DARK_MATTER.description:
You can only play one [gold]Dark Matter[/gold] each turn.
Add two copies of this card to your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] when this card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold].
MARISAMOD-DARK_SPARK.title: Dark Spark
MARISAMOD-DARK_SPARK.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each card in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].
MARISAMOD-D_C.title: Direct Hit
MARISAMOD-D_C.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
If your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] is empty, deal double damage.
MARISAMOD-DEEP_ECOLOGICAL_BOMB.title: Deep Ecological Bomb
MARISAMOD-DEEP_ECOLOGICAL_BOMB.descripti:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy, that enemy lose {Power:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
Amplify {Energy:energyIcons()}: Activate again.
MARISAMOD-DOUBLE_SPARK.title: Double Spark
MARISAMOD-DOUBLE_SPARK.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and add a [gold]Spark[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MARISAMOD-DRAGON_METEOR.title: Dragon Meteor
MARISAMOD-DRAGON_METEOR.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If there is [gold]Enchanted[/gold] card in your [gold]Hand[/gold], gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
MARISAMOD-EARTH_LIGHT_RAY.selectionScree: Choose a card to put back in your Hand.
MARISAMOD-EARTH_LIGHT_RAY.title: Earth Light Ray
MARISAMOD-EARTH_LIGHT_RAY.description:
Heal {Heal:diff()} hp.
Amplify {Energy:energyIcons()}: Put a {IfUpgraded:show:|random }card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MARISAMOD-ECCENTRIC_ASTEROID.title: Eccentric Asteroid
MARISAMOD-ECCENTRIC_ASTEROID.description: Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].For each [gold]Spark[/gold] card you played this turn, gain {CalculationExtra:diff()} more.
MARISAMOD-ENERGY_FLOW.title: Energy Flow
MARISAMOD-ENERGY_FLOW.description: At the end of your turn, gain {EnergyFlowPower:diff()} [gold]Charge-Up[/gold].
MARISAMOD-ENERGY_RECOIL.title: Energy Recoil
MARISAMOD-ESCAPE_VELOCITY.title: Escape Velocity
MARISAMOD-ESCAPE_VELOCITY.description: If you end your turn with cards in [gold]Hand[/gold],draw that many cards (up to {Cards:diff()}) next turn.
MARISAMOD-EVENT_HORIZON.title: Event Horizon
MARISAMOD-EVENT_HORIZON.description: Whenever you active an [gold]Amplify[/gold] effect,you may put an [gold]Attack[/gold] from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold], up to {Power:diff()} {Power:plural:time|times} each turn.
MARISAMOD-EXHAUSTION.title: Exhaustion
MARISAMOD-EXHAUSTION.description: You cannot gain [gold]Charge-Up[/gold] while this in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MARISAMOD-FAIRY_DESTRUCTION_RAY.title: Fairy Destruction Ray
MARISAMOD-FAIRY_DESTRUCTION_RAY.descript:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Amplify {Energy:energyIcons()}: Kill enemies with {CullingLine:diff()} or less HP.
MARISAMOD-FINAL_SPARK.title: Final Spark
MARISAMOD-FINAL_SPARK.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies,reset this card's cost.
Costs {Energy:energyIcons()} less when you play a [gold]Spark[/gold] card.
MARISAMOD-GALACTIC_HALO.title: Galactic Halo
MARISAMOD-GAS_GIANT.title: Gas Giant
MARISAMOD-GRAND_CROSS.title: Grand Cross
MARISAMOD-GRAND_CROSS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Reduce this card's cost to 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} for the turn when you activate an [gold]Amplify[/gold] effect.
MARISAMOD-GRAVITY_BEAT.title: Gravity Beat
MARISAMOD-GRAVITY_BEAT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and draw a card for every {Div:diff()} cards in your deck.{InCombat:
({CalculatedRepeat:diff()}{CalculatedRepeat:plural:time|times})|}
MARISAMOD-ILLUSION_STAR.title: Illusion Star
MARISAMOD-ILLUSION_STAR.description:
Add {Cards:diff()} random cards to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Put {PutBack:diff()} {PutBack:plural:card|cards} from your [gold]Hand[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
MARISAMOD-ILLUSION_STAR.selectionScreenP: Choose Cards to put on top of your Draw Pile
MARISAMOD-LUMINES_STRIKE.title: Lumines Strike
MARISAMOD-MACHINE_GUN_SPARK.title: Machine Gun Spark
MARISAMOD-MAGICAL_R360.title: Magical R360
MARISAMOD-MAGICAL_R360.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Enchant[/gold] a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] with [gold]Starlit[/gold].
MARISAMOD-MAGIC_ABSORBER.title: Magic Absorber
MARISAMOD-MAGIC_ABSORBER.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Remove a random Debuff from you.
MARISAMOD-MAGIC_CHANT.title: Magic Chant
MARISAMOD-MAGIC_CHANT.description: Put a card from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].[gold]Enchant[/gold] it with [gold]Starlit[/gold] if able.
MARISAMOD-MAGIC_CHANT.selectionScreenPro: Select a card to put in your Hand.
MARISAMOD-MANA_CONVECTION.title: Mana Convection
MARISAMOD-MANA_CONVECTION.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] up to {Cards:diff()} cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold].Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} foreach card [gold]Exhausted[/gold].
Draw a card if there is any card not from your deck among cards [gold]Exhausted[/gold].
MARISAMOD-MANA_RAMPAGE.title: Mana Rampage
MARISAMOD-MAXIMISE_POWER.title: Maximise Power
MARISAMOD-MAXIMISE_POWER.description:
Convert your [gold]Charge-Up[/gold] into {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Add an [gold]Exhaustion[/gold] to your Hand.
Your Attacks deal 50% more damage until end of turn.
MARISAMOD-METEORIC_SHOWER.title: Meteoric Shower
MARISAMOD-METEORIC_SHOWER.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] up to X{IfUpgraded:show:+1|} cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
For each card [gold]Exhausted[/gold], deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy, or twice if it is a [gold]Burn[/gold].
MARISAMOD-MILKY_WAY.title: Milky Way
MARISAMOD-MILKY_WAY.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Draw a card.
Increase the damage of Attacks in your Hand have by {Add:diff()}.
MARISAMOD-MILLISECOND_PULSARS.title: Millisecond Pulsars
MARISAMOD-MILLISECOND_PULSARS.descriptio: [gold]Amplify[/gold] does not require extra energy to activate.
MARISAMOD-MYSTERIOUS_BEAM.title: Mysterious Beam
MARISAMOD-MYSTERIOUS_BEAM.description: Add a random {IfUpgraded:show:upgraded |}Attack to your [gold]Hand[/gold].Deal damage equals to damage of the added card.
MARISAMOD-NON_DIRECTIONAL_LASER.title: Non-Directional Laser
MARISAMOD-NON_DIRECTIONAL_LASER.descript: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies,then deal {Damage:diff()} to a random enemy.
MARISAMOD-OCCULATION.title: Occulation
MARISAMOD-OCCULATION.description:
Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equals to the number of cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold],then discard your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].{InCombat:
(Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} block)|}
MARISAMOD-ONE_TIME_OFF.title: One Time Off
MARISAMOD-ONE_TIME_OFF.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
You will not activate [gold]Charge-Up[/gold] or [gold]Amplify[/gold] until end of turn.
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} next turn.
MARISAMOD-OORT_CLOUD.title: Oort Cloud
MARISAMOD-OPEN_UNIVERSE.title: Open Universe
MARISAMOD-OPEN_UNIVERSE.description:
Add {Add:diff()} random cards to your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Draw {Draw:diff()} cards.
MARISAMOD-ORBITAL.selectionScreenPrompt: Choose Cards to put to your Hand
MARISAMOD-ORBITAL.title: Orbital
MARISAMOD-ORBITAL.description:
Draw a card when drawn.
If this card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], put up to {Add:diff()} {Add:plural:card|cards} from your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold] to your hand.
MARISAMOD-ORRERYS_GALAXY.title: Orrerys Galaxy
MARISAMOD-ORRERYS_SUN.title: Orrerys Sun
MARISAMOD-POLARIS_UNIQUE.title: Polaris Unique
MARISAMOD-POLARIS_UNIQUE.description:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Increase this card's cost by 1.
MARISAMOD-POWER_UP.title: Power UP
MARISAMOD-POWER_UP.description: Increase the damage of Attacks in your Hand have by {Add:diff()}.
MARISAMOD-PULSE_MAGIC.title: Pulse Magic
MARISAMOD-PULSE_MAGIC.description:
Next turn, gain {GainEnergy:energyIcons()}.
Amplify {LoseEnergy:energyIcons()}: [gold]Amplify[/gold] does not require extra energy to activate this turn.
MARISAMOD-REFRACTION_SPARK.title: Refraction Spark
MARISAMOD-REFRACTION_SPARK.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.Increase the damage of [gold]Spark[/gold] cards in your hand by the unblocked damage dealt.
Amplify {Energy:energyIcons()}: Deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage.
MARISAMOD-ROB.title: Rob
MARISAMOD-ROB.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage, gain [gold]Gold[/gold] equal to [gold]unblocked[/gold] damage dealt.
Amplify {Energy:energyIcons()}: Double the [gold]Gold[/gold] gain.
MARISAMOD-SATELLITE_ILLUSION.title: Satellite Illusion
MARISAMOD-SATELLITE_ILLUSION.description: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} when the number of cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] increases after you play a card.
MARISAMOD-SHOOT_THE_DANMAKU_BARRIER.desc:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
This card has [gold]Replay[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] if is [gold]Enchanted[/gold].
MARISAMOD-SHOOT_THE_MOON.title: Shoot the Moon
MARISAMOD-SHOOT_THE_MOON.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. Remove a random Buff from the target if it is not a boss.
Amplify {Energy:energyIcons()}: Deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage and remove ALL BUFF.
MARISAMOD-SHOOTING_ECHO.title: Shooting Echo
MARISAMOD-SHOOTING_ECHO.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card. If [gold]Exhausted[/gold] card is a [gold]Burn[/gold], return this card to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MARISAMOD-SINGULARITY.title: Singularity
MARISAMOD-SINGULARITY.description: When you play a card that cost 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)},increase the damage of a random Attack in your [gold]Hand[/gold] by {Power:diff()}.
MARISAMOD-SPARK.title: Spark
MARISAMOD-SPORE_BOMB.title: Spore Bomb
MARISAMOD-SPORE_BOMB.description:
Apply {Power:diff()} [gold]Invulnerable[/gold].
Amplify {Energy:energyIcons()}: Apply to ALL Enemies.
MARISAMOD-SPRINKLE_STAR_N_HEART.title: Sprinkle Star & Heart
MARISAMOD-SPRINKLE_STAR_N_HEART.descript:
Your [gold]Starlit[/gold] will not be removed upon trigger until your next turn.
Amplify {Energy:energyIcons()}: gain {Power:diff()} [gold]Starlit[/gold].
MARISAMOD-SPRINKLE_STAR_SEAL.title: Sprinkle Star Seal
MARISAMOD-STAR_BARRAGE.title: Star Barrage
MARISAMOD-STAR_BARRAGE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} {Repeat:plural:time|times}.
Increase hit count of this card by 1.
MARISAMOD-STAR_DUST_REVERIE.title: Star Dust Reverie
MARISAMOD-STAR_DUST_REVERIE.description: Put your [gold]Hand[/gold] back to your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] randomly, then add that many {IfUpgraded:show:upgraded |} random cards to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MARISAMOD-STARLIGHT_TYPHOON.title: Starlight Typhoon
MARISAMOD-STARLIGHT_TYPHOON.description: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] all non-Attack cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Add {IfUpgraded:show:an upgraded|a} [gold]Spark[/gold] into your hand for each card [gold]Exhausted[/gold].
MARISAMOD-STARLIT_POTION.title: Starlit Potion
MARISAMOD-STARLIT_POTION.description: [gold]Enchant[/gold] All cards in your hand with [gold]Starlit[/gold].
MARISAMOD-SUPER_NOVA.title: Super Nova
MARISAMOD-SUPER_NOVA.description:
[gold]Burn[/gold] no longer deal damage to you.
Gain {Power:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] when a [gold]Burn[/gold] is [gold]Burnt[/gold].
[gold]Burn[/gold] your [gold]hand[/gold] at the end of your turn.
MARISAMOD-SUPER_PERSEIDS.title: Super Perseids
MARISAMOD-SUPER_PERSEIDS.description:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} when drawn.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} times when [gold]Exhausted[/gold].
MARISAMOD-TREASURE_HUNTER.title: Treasure Hunter
MARISAMOD-TREASURE_HUNTER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If [gold]Fatal[/gold] against a Boss or Elite, add an extra [gold]Relic[/gold] to rewards of this combat.
MARISAMOD-ULTRA_SHORT_WAVE.title: Ultra-Short Wave
MARISAMOD-ULTRA_SHORT_WAVE.description:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and {Power:diff()} [gold]Charge-Up[/gold].
Increase this card's Energy gain by 1 and [gold]Charge-Up[/gold] gain by {PowerInc:diff()}.
MARISAMOD-UNSTABLE_BOMB.title: Unstable Bomb
MARISAMOD-UNSTABLE_BOMB.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {RepeatBase:diff()} to {RepeatUpper:diff()} times.
MARISAMOD-WALPURGISNACHT.title: Walpurgisnacht
MARISAMOD-WALPURGISNACHT.description:
At the start of your turn, [gold]Enchant[/gold] {Power:diff()} random {Power:plural:card|cards} in your hand with [gold]Starlit[/gold].
Whenever you play an [gold]enchanted[/gold] card, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} next turn.
MARISAMOD-WITCH_LEYLINE.title: Witch Leyline
MARISAMOD-WITCH_LEYLINE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add a [gold]Burn[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MARISAMOD-WITCH_OF_GREED.title: Witch of Greed
MARISAMOD-WITCH_OF_GREED.description:
At the end of combat, gain {Gold:diff()} Gold.
Amplify {Energy:energyIcons()}:Gain an additional [gold]Potion[/gold].
